title: Pushing My AI Dark Factory to Its Limits with Opus + Kimi Combined
summary: Cole Medin demonstrates a hybrid approach combining Claude Opus for complex reasoning tasks with Kimi K2.6 for implementation and validation. The strategy optimizes token efficiency by routing reasoning-intensive steps to a stronger model while keeping faster execution on cheaper models.
